title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: This Security Intelligence podcast examines Project Lightwell, IBM and Red Hat's initiative to apply AI-augmented engineers and security oversight to the open source ecosystem. It also discusses SymJack, an attack that exploits AI coding agents by manipulating configuration files, and LayerX's findings on uneven AI adoption creating fragmentation in the software supply chain.
